The Barber

Meet Harsh

Based out of Long Island, NYC, Harsh has spent over eight years perfecting the art of barbering. His philosophy is simple: every client deserves a premium experience, whether they walk into the shop or call for a mobile appointment.

With a meticulous eye for detail and a passion for clean lines, fades, and modern styles, Harsh has built a reputation as one of the most trusted barbers in the area. Quality is never compromised — it's guaranteed.

✦
Premium QualityEvery cut treated as a signature piece
◈
Mobile BarberWe come to you, anywhere on Long Island
◉
8+ Years MasteryTrained & certified expertise
★
5-Star RatedConsistent excellence, every visit
What We Offer

Our Services

Every service is performed with premium precision and care. Contact us to discuss pricing tailored to your needs.

01
✂
Signature Haircut
A full cut sculpted to your face shape, lifestyle, and vision. Includes a precision consultation before every session.
02
◈
Skin Fade
Flawless gradients from skin to full — low, mid, or high. Clean, sharp, and perfectly blended every time.
03
◉
Beard Lineup & Shape
Define your beard with surgical precision. From sharp lines to natural taper, your beard gets the attention it deserves.
04
✦
Kids' Cut
Patient, professional service for the young clients. Clean cuts done right — every age, every style.
05
⬡
Locs & Texture Work
Specialized care for locs, waves, and textured hair. Expert maintenance, shaping, and edge work.
06
⌂
Mobile VIP Service
The full HarshCutz experience delivered to your home, office, or event. Premium barbering, at your convenience.
